{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2017}} {{Use dmy dates|date=July 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 74th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival74poster.jpg |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[Downsizing (film)|Downsizing]]'' |closing = ''[[Outrage Coda]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[The Shape of Water]]'' |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] |host = [[Alessandro Borghi (actor)|Alessandro Borghi]] |date = 30 August – 9 September 2017 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[73rd Venice International Film Festival|73rd]] | followed_by = [[75th Venice International Film Festival|75th]] }} [[File:74 Venice Film Festival - 2 September 2017 (36586985330).jpg|thumb|right|300px|The main entrance of the Cinema Palace during the festival.]] The '''74th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 30 August to 9 September 2017, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web |url= http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/2017 |title= 74th Venice International Film Festival |work= labiennale.org |date= 20 February 2017 |access-date=17 April 2018}} American actress [[Annette Bening]] was the jury president for the main competition.{{cite web |last=Tartaglione |first=Nancy |date=5 July 2017 |title=Annette Bening Named President Of Venice Film Festival Jury; 1st Woman Since 2006 |url=https://deadline.com/2017/07/annette-bening-venice-film-festival-jury-president-2017-1202123761 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170705123724/http://deadline.com/2017/07/annette-bening-venice-film-festival-jury-president-2017-1202123761/ |archive-date=5 July 2017 |access-date=5 July 2017 |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]]}} Italian actor [[Alessandro Borghi (actor)|Alessandro Borghi]] hosted the opening and closing nights of the festival.{{cite web |date=9 June 2017 |title=Alessandro Borghi condurrà le serate di apertura e chiusura alla Mostra di Venezia |url=http://www.repubblica.it/spettacoli/people/2017/06/09/news/alessandro_borghi_condurra_le_serate_di_apertura_e_chiusura_alla_mostra_di_venezia-167662619/ |access-date=17 July 2017 |work=Repubblica.it}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[The Shape of Water]]'' by [[Guillermo del Toro]].{{cite web |date=9 September 2017 |title=Venice: Guillermo del Toro Wins Golden Lion for 'The Shape of Water' |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/venice-film-festival-awards-announced-1037091 |access-date=9 September 2017 |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]}} A new section for [[Virtual reality|virtual-reality]] (VR) films was introduced in this edition of the festival, as part of the Official Selection. 22 films were selected for the first-ever competition for films made in VR, while several more were presented in out-of-competition subsections.{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/2017/biennale-cinema-2017-venice-virtual-reality |title=Biennale Cinema 2017, Venice Virtual Reality |work=labiennale.org |date=11 October 2017 |access-date=18 April 2018}} The festival opened with ''[[Downsizing (film)|Downsizing]]'' by [[Alexander Payne]], and closed with ''[[Outrage Coda]]'' by [[Takeshi Kitano]].{{cite web |date=14 July 2017 |title='Downsizing,' Starring Matt Damon, to Open Venice Film Festival |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/downsizing-starring-matt-damon-open-venice-film-festival-1021422 |access-date=17 July 2017 |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]}} ==Juries== === Main
